title: What is Clever?
heading: What is Clever?
content:
/\*! tailwindcss v4.1.17 | MIT License | https://tailwindcss.com \*/ @layer theme, base, components, utilities; @layer utilities;

Use this page to understand Clever’s integration options and choose the right starting point for your app.

## 

What Clever provides

[](#what-clever-provides)

Clever helps you integrate your app with school and district systems through rostering and single sign-on.

For developers, Clever supports these common integration paths:

-   **Clever Secure Sync** for district-managed rostering data
-   **Clever Single Sign-On** for district-managed login
-   **Clever LMS Connect** for LMS workflows such as grade passback and LTI 1.3 SSO
-   **AnySchool Rostering** for supporting schools that are not on Clever
-   **Clever Library** for teacher-managed sign-up and classroom rostering

Clever integrates with student information systems (SISs) through direct integrations and SFTP automations. Depending on the integration type you choose, your app can receive identity data, roster data, or LMS-related data.

## 

Choose your starting point

[](#choose-your-starting-point)

-   If you need a district-managed integration, start with [Clever Complete Integration Types and Quickstart Guides](https://dev.clever.com/docs/integration-types).
-   If you want to build and test without a Clever Complete subscription, start with [Getting Started with Clever](https://dev.clever.com/docs/getting-started) and [Clever Library - Overview](https://dev.clever.com/docs/library-sso).

> 📘
> 
> ### 
> 
> **New to Clever?**
> 
> [](#new-to-clever)
> 
> Learn about Clever’s app partner model and district workflows in [Clever Academy for App Partners](https://clever.academy/ca-app-partners).

## 

What is Clever Complete?

[](#what-is-clever-complete)

> 📘
> 
> ### 
> 
> What is Clever Complete?
> 
> [](#what-is-clever-complete)
> 
> Clever Complete is the platform solution purpose-built for EdTech scalability—connecting our application partners to any school through a single, secure integration for rostering, SSO, and LMS connections.

A **Clever Complete** subscription can include these integration types:

-   [Clever Secure Sync](https://dev.clever.com/docs/secure-sync-rostering)
-   [Clever Single Sign-On](https://dev.clever.com/docs/district-sso-1)
-   [Clever LMS Connect](https://dev.clever.com/docs/clever-lms-connect)
-   [AnySchool Rostering](https://dev.clever.com/docs/anyschool-rostering)
-   [SAML Integrations](https://dev.clever.com/docs/saml)

To compare these options, see [Clever Complete Integration Types and Quickstart Guides](https://dev.clever.com/docs/integration-types).

## 

Clever Library

[](#clever-library)

If you want to build with Clever without a Clever Complete subscription, start with a **Clever Library** integration.

Clever Library is a teacher-managed integration path that lets teachers add your app, authorize classroom data sharing, and provision their classes without a district-managed subscription.

Start here:

-   [Getting Started with Clever](https://dev.clever.com/docs/getting-started)
-   [Clever Library - Overview](https://dev.clever.com/docs/library-sso)
